title: Debugging, Review, and Adversarial Prompting · Failure Case: Hypothesis Tests
summary: Diagnose a failing build and review the repair against a base branch. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt hypothesis tests increment in an evidence-first debug and review playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Rank competing hypotheses and choose discriminating checks.
Capture a minimal reproduction, exact error, environment, and last-known-good boundary before repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
